records.m_Talk_ENG: The icy pain seeps even into my memory...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The icy pain seeps even into my memory...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The icy pain seeps even into my memory...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, why are you here, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, why are you here, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, why are you here, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: On second thought, there were some things that don't quite add up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On second thought, there were some things that don't quite add up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On second thought, there were some things that don't quite add up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I visited the site separately from you, but I was unintentionally caught in the Corruption storm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I visited the site separately from you, but I was unintentionally caught in the Corruption storm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I visited the site separately from you, but I was unintentionally caught in the Corruption storm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean by "some things that don't quite add up"...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean by "some things that don't quite add up"...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean by "some things that don't quite add up"...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't some aspects of the Administration's published data partially match the conditions inside the dimension?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't some aspects of the Administration's published data partially match the conditions inside the dimension?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't some aspects of the Administration's published data partially match the conditions inside the dimension?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had hoped it was nothing more than a concern... But seeing the landscape here, I'm now certain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had hoped it was nothing more than a concern... But seeing the landscape here, I'm now certain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had hoped it was nothing more than a concern... But seeing the landscape here, I'm now certain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This phenomenon is closely tied to a dimensional entanglement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This phenomenon is closely tied to a dimensional entanglement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This phenomenon is closely tied to a dimensional entanglement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional entanglement?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional entanglement?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional entanglement?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quite literally, it's when multiple dimensions intertwine like tangled threads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quite literally, it's when multiple dimensions intertwine like tangled threads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quite literally, it's when multiple dimensions intertwine like tangled threads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place is a localized zone of mental corruption, created as the rules of the world become entangled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place is a localized zone of mental corruption, created as the rules of the world become entangled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place is a localized zone of mental corruption, created as the rules of the world become entangled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's practically a place of imagination where mental influences are maximized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's practically a place of imagination where mental influences are maximized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's practically a place of imagination where mental influences are maximized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simply put, now anything can happen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Simply put, now anything can happen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Simply put, now anything can happen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A croquette? Why is something like this falling from the sky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A croquette? Why is something like this falling from the sky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A croquette? Why is something like this falling from the sky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the "anything can happen" that you were talking about, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this the "anything can happen" that you were talking about, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the "anything can happen" that you were talking about, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all! Perhaps an elegant and beautiful girl, but not a croquette like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all! Perhaps an elegant and beautiful girl, but not a croquette like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all! Perhaps an elegant and beautiful girl, but not a croquette like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaahhh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaahhh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaahhh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss? Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss? Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss? Are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey... What are you doing, showing up out of nowhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey... What are you doing, showing up out of nowhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey... What are you doing, showing up out of nowhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give it back, please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give it back, please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give it back, please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, what...? Give what back...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, what...? Give what back...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, what...? Give what back...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Potato Popper...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Potato Popper...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Potato Popper...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give it back, please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give it back, please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give it back, please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give what back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give what back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give what back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Potato Popper...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Potato Popper...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Potato Popper...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you please get off me first...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you please get off me first...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you please get off me first...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should be the one asking that. Even in the Counterside, it's my first time seeing a person fall from the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should be the one asking that. Even in the Counterside, it's my first time seeing a person fall from the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should be the one asking that. Even in the Counterside, it's my first time seeing a person fall from the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Ais Wallenstein of the Loki Familia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Ais Wallenstein of the Loki Familia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Ais Wallenstein of the Loki Familia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I jumped into the tunnel to rescue a companion, but ended up here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I jumped into the tunnel to rescue a companion, but ended up here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I jumped into the tunnel to rescue a companion, but ended up here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A tunnel? Are you talking about the Corruption storm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A tunnel? Are you talking about the Corruption storm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A tunnel? Are you talking about the Corruption storm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption storm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption storm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption storm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, have you seen a boy with white hair?
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, have you seen a boy with white hair?
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, have you seen a boy with white hair?

records.m_Talk_ENG: His name is Bell...
records.m_Talk_DEU: His name is Bell...
records.m_Talk_FRA: His name is Bell...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, you were right after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, you were right after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, you were right after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You believe me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You believe me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You believe me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then isn't that a big problem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then isn't that a big problem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then isn't that a big problem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. The CRF distortion is the cause, so it'll stabilize with time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. The CRF distortion is the cause, so it'll stabilize with time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. The CRF distortion is the cause, so it'll stabilize with time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a good idea to rest here for the time being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a good idea to rest here for the time being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a good idea to rest here for the time being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Ais, would you mind keeping watch around the area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Ais, would you mind keeping watch around the area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Ais, would you mind keeping watch around the area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: OK, got it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: OK, got it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: OK, got it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you feeling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you feeling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you feeling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the inconvenience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the inconvenience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the inconvenience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Boss. What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Boss. What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Boss. What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it obvious? Women should always be dressed as bunny girls!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it obvious? Women should always be dressed as bunny girls!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it obvious? Women should always be dressed as bunny girls!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, you're not even Boss! Give me back my clothes right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, you're not even Boss! Give me back my clothes right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, you're not even Boss! Give me back my clothes right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. While your embarrassed expression is a masterpiece, I'm not willing to take the risk, you see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. While your embarrassed expression is a masterpiece, I'm not willing to take the risk, you see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. While your embarrassed expression is a masterpiece, I'm not willing to take the risk, you see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reverse bunny costume is still left, but... I'll retreat for now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reverse bunny costume is still left, but... I'll retreat for now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reverse bunny costume is still left, but... I'll retreat for now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait a second. Where do you think you're going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait a second. Where do you think you're going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait a second. Where do you think you're going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get back here, you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get back here, you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get back here, you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arrrrrgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arrrrrgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arrrrrgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did something happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did something happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did something happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to your clothes...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to your clothes...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to your clothes...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Ais.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Ais.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Ais.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pinch my cheek.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pinch my cheek.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pinch my cheek.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No, I'm not okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No, I'm not okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No, I'm not okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did this have to happen... on the company-wide vacation...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did this have to happen... on the company-wide vacation...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did this have to happen... on the company-wide vacation...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what do I have to do...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, am I the only one who feels like this conversation is unnatural?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. Considering the situation, there's a chance she might be an Exile, but it's too soon to be certain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like we'll need to have a proper conversation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, you were right after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, you were right after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, you were right after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't believe all that talk about multiple dimensions, but I never thought I'd actually meet someone from a different world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You believe me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You believe me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You believe me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've experienced several similar phenomena before, though not exactly to this extent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've experienced things like dimensional jumps and quantum tunnels before, so maybe I've just become a bit desensitized to situations like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... is it okay if I call you Ais?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, please call me Ais... Miss Mina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to call me whatever you like. I'm not really particular about those things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll need to strengthen our bond if we're going to get out of this unfamiliar place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since neither of us seems to have been heavily affected by the Corruption storm, if there are no other abnormalities...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh no, I just jinxed it, haven't I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like... my body's suddenly gotten heavier...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you're experiencing aftereffects from being caught in a sudden dimensional storm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then isn't that a big problem?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then isn't that a big problem?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. The CRF distortion is the cause, so it'll stabilize with time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. The CRF distortion is the cause, so it'll stabilize with time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a good idea to rest here for the time being.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Ais, would you mind keeping watch around the area?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Ais, would you mind keeping watch around the area?

root.m_Talk_ENG: OK, got it.

root.m_Talk_FRA: OK, got it.

root.m_Talk_DEU: How are you feeling?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How are you feeling?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My arms and legs are starting to move little by little, but it'll probably be a while before I can move properly.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the inconvenience.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Boss. What are you doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... what are you doing?! Why did you suddenly change my clothes?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it obvious? Women should always be dressed as bunny girls!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it obvious? Women should always be dressed as bunny girls!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, you're not even Boss! Give me back my clothes right now!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. While your embarrassed expression is a masterpiece, I'm not willing to take the risk, you see.
